detail: Merged explicit Navigation2D.Spatial config with UpdateMode=Adaptive, RebuildCellMigrationsThreshold=128, RebuildAccumulatedCellMigrationsThreshold=1024.
Navigation2DPlaygroundMod reads Constants.IntValues.navigation2d_playground_agents_per_team=5000 and exposes spatial counters on HUD.
QuarterCrossCellMigration ORCA avg_ms_per_tick=11.7765 cell_map_ms=0.2523 dirty_agents_per_tick=2500.0 cell_migrations_per_tick=416.7.
QuarterCrossCellMigration Hybrid avg_ms_per_tick=10.7081 cell_map_ms=0.2493 dirty_agents_per_tick=2500.0 cell_migrations_per_tick=416.7.
QuarterCrossCellMigration Sonar avg_ms_per_tick=11.2656 cell_map_ms=0.2212 dirty_agents_per_tick=2500.1 cell_migrations_per_tick=416.7.
Adaptive rebuild eliminates the prior churn-induced hitch; the 10k migration scenario remains within low double-digit milliseconds.
